item.name: Spectral Snake Eel
item.description:
Now that its spectral nature has taken precedence, the question of whether this wavekin is a snake or an eel has become irrelevant.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: While the majority of snake eels tend to lurk under the sands and await the coming of their prey, these creatures─likely realizing that such tactics are not quite as effective when one has sparkling blue scales─have been spotted near the water's surface, blending in with the azure surf to catch their victims unawares.
